# NotebookLM

Google's note-taking + Q&A product. Briefly evaluated at Janus for org-chart and presentation outputs; **retired 2026-05-11** in favour of HTML-based outputs (editable, version-controllable, browser-native, cheaper). See [[2026-05-11-notebooklm-retirement-html-over-image-outputs]] for the decision record.

## Status

Archived. No active Janus use as of 2026-05-14. The architectural replacement is HTML-as-presentation per [[2026-05-12-html-as-presentation-format-adopted]]; the broader lesson lives in [[2026-05-11-html-over-powerpoint-for-read-only-content]].
